players.name: Vozinha
players.bio:
Josimar José Évora Dias (born 3 June 1986), known as Vozinha, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Liga Portugal 2 club Chaves and the Cape Verde national team.

He played for clubs in his country, Angola, Moldova, Portugal and Cyprus. A full international with over 50 caps for Cape Verde since 2012, he played at the Africa Cup of Nations in 2013, 2015, 2021 and 2023

players.name: Stopira
players.bio:
Ianique dos Santos Tavares (born 20 May 1988), commonly known as Stopira, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Liga Portugal 2 club Torreense.

He spent most of his career in Hungary with Fehérvár, having signed for the club in 2012.
players.birth_location: Nossa Senhora da Graça, Cape Verde

players.name: Diney
players.bio: Edilson Alberto Monteiro Sanches Borges (born 17 January 1995), known as Diney, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Emirati club Al Bataeh.

players.name: Roberto Lopes
players.bio:
Roberto Lopes (born 17 June 1992), also known as Pico, is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Shamrock Rovers. Born in Ireland, Lopes plays for the Cape Verde national team.

In November 2016 Lopes joined Shamrock Rovers after leaving rivals Bohemians.

In 2019 Lopes started the FAI Cup final in which Rovers went on to win after defeating Dundalk on penalties winning the cup for the first time since 1987 and for a record 25th time. In 2020 Lopes was key member to the Shamro

players.name: Logan Costa
players.bio:
Logan Evans Costa (born 1 April 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Villarreal. Born in France, he represents the Cape Verde national team.

Costa is a former French youth international, having represented them at U16 and U17 level, before switching to play for Cape Verde in 2022.

players.name: Kevin Pina
players.full_name: Kevin Lenini Gonçalves Pereira de Pina
players.bio:
Kevin Lenini Gonçalves Pereira de Pina (born 27 January 1997) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Russian club Krasnodar and the Cape Verde national team.

A youth product of the Cape Verdean team Tchadense, Pina made his professional debut with Oliveirense in a 3–2 LigaPro loss to Benfica B on 13 January 2018. He shortly after went on loan to Anadia and Sertanense, before transferring to Chaves in 2019.

On 8 September 2022, Pina signed a three-

players.name: Jovane Cabral
players.bio: Jovane Eduardo Borges Cabral (born 14 June 1998) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a winger for Primeira Liga club Estrela da Amadora and the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Gilson Benchimol
players.bio: Gilson Benchimol Tavares (born 29 December 2001), or simply Benchimol, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a striker for Russian club Akron Tolyatti and the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Jamiro Monteiro
players.bio:
Jamiro Gregory Monteiro Alvarenga (born 23 November 1993), commonly known as Jamiro, is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Eredivisie club PEC Zwolle. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Cape Verde national team. 

Monteiro was raised by his Cape Verde immigrant parents in Rotterdam, Netherlands. Often viewed as undersized, at age 20, Monteiro's skills at football eventually landed him the opportunity to join the U21 system at FC Dordrecht. By 21, he eventually sign

players.name: Garry Rodrigues
players.bio:
Garry Mendes Rodrigues (born 27 November 1990) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Cypriot First Division club Apollon Limassol. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.

In February 2013, Rodrigues announced that he would like to represent Cape Verde, and made his debut in August 2013. He represented the side at the 2015 and 2021 Africa Cup of Nations.

He formerly played for PAOK, Elche CF, XerxesDZB, FC Boshuizen, ADO Den Haag, Dordrecht, Levs

players.name: Márcio Rosa
players.bio: Márcio Salomão Brazão da Rosa (born 23 February 1997) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Bulgarian First League club Montana and the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Sidny Lopes Cabral
players.bio: Sidny Lopes Cabral (born 18 September 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Primeira Liga club Benfica. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Deroy Duarte
players.bio: Deroy D'Encarnação Duarte (born 4 July 1999) is a professional football player who plays as a midfielder for Bulgarian First League club Ludogorets Razgrad. Born in the Netherlands, he represents the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Laros Duarte
players.bio: Laros Michael D'Encarnação Duarte (born 28 February 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Hungarian club Puskás Akadémia. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Yannick Semedo
players.bio: Jair Semedo Monteiro (born 29 December 1995), known as Yannick Semedo, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Liga Portugal 2 club Farense and the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Willy Semedo
players.bio: Willy Johnson Semedo Afonso (born 27 April 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Cypriot First Division club Omonia. Born in France, Semedo plays for the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Telmo Arcanjo
players.bio: Telmo Emanuel Gomes Arcanjo (born 21 June 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or winger for Vitória S.C. Born in Portugal, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Dailon Livramento
players.bio: Dailon Rocha Livramento do Rosario (born 4 May 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Portuguese Primeira Liga club Casa Pia on loan from Italian club Hellas Verona. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Ryan Mendes
players.bio: Ryan Isaac Mendes da Graça (born 8 January 1990 in Mindelo, São Vicente) is a Cape Verdean football winger who plays for Lille in the Ligue 1.

players.name: Nuno da Costa
players.bio:
Nuno Miguel da Costa Jóia (born 10 February 1991), known as Nuno da Costa, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a forward or winger for Süper Lig club İstanbul Başakşehir and the Cape Verde national team.

Raised in France, he began his senior career with Aubagne in the fifth tier before moving to Valenciennes of Ligue 2 in 2015. Two years later he debuted in Ligue 1 with Strasbourg, where he won the Coupe de la Ligue in 2019. In January 2020, he signed for Nottingham Forest.

players.name: Steven Moreira
players.bio: Steven Moreira (born 13 August 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back or centre-back for Columbus Crew in Major League Soccer. Born in France, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: CJ dos Santos
players.bio: Jonathan dos Santos Ramírez (born 26 April 1990) is a Mexican professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club LA Galaxy and the Mexico national team.

players.name: Wagner Pina
players.bio: Wagner Fabrício Cardoso de Pina (born 3 November 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Süper Lig club Trabzonspor. Born in Portugal, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Kelvin Pires
players.bio: Kelvin Spencer Pires (born 5 June 2000) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a centre back for Veikkausliiga club SJK and the Cape Verde national team.

players.name: Hélio Varela
players.bio:
Hélio Sandro Oliveira Alves Varela (born 3 May 2002) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a winger for Israeli Premier League club Maccabi Tel Aviv. Born in Portugal, Varela plays for the Cape Verde national team.

Club career
Varela is a youth product of Monte Caparica, Charneca Caparica, Vitória Setúbal and Cova da Piedade. He began his senior career with Amora in 2020, before joining Sintrense for the 2021–22 Liga 3 season. He moved to the reserves of Portimonense in the
